projectDescription: Suno is an AI-powered music generation platform that lets anyone create complete, original songs — vocals, lyrics, and full production — from a simple text prompt.
keyFeatures: Text-to-song generation with vocals, lyrics, and full production
AI model versions (v4, v4.5, v5, v5.5) with progressively better quality
Song Editor for section-by-section editing, reordering, and replacement
Stem extraction into up to 12 time-aligned WAV/MIDI stems
Suno Studio — browser-based generative audio workstation (DAW)
Custom models tuned on your own audio
Persona voices for consistent vocal identity
Upload and remix your own audio (up to 30 minutes)
Creative sliders for weirdness, style, and structure control
Commercial use rights on paid plans
Mobile app on iOS and Android
publicApiSurface: Get Stems (Auto, Split from mix, Advanced 12-track)
